    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    N

    name - Variable in Klasse persistance.PlayerData
     
    name - Variable in Klasse players.PlayerEntity
     
    neighbors - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
     
    neighbors - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.Node
     
    NEW_GAME_SCREEN_NAME - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    NewGameScreenPanel - Klasse in view
    This class creates the New Game Screen JPanel.
    NewGameScreenPanel() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.NewGameScreenPanel
     
    nextPhase() - Methode in Klasse phases.GamePhase
    Advances to the next game phase if the conditions are met.
    nextPhase() - Methode in Klasse phases.JumpingPhase
    Checks if the condition to change the phase is met (2 stones remaining).
    nextPhase() - Methode in Klasse phases.MovingPhase
    Checks if the condition to change the phase is met (3 stones remaining).
    nextPhase() - Methode in Klasse phases.SettingPhase
    Checks if the condition to change the phase is met (all stones are placed).
    Node - Klasse in boardLogic
    Represents a node in the game board.
    Node(int) - Konstruktor für Klasse boardLogic.Node
    Constructs a node with the given ID.
    nodePositions - Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    nodes - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
     
    noMillTurnCounter - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    noMillTurnCounter - Variable in Klasse persistance.GameStateData
     
    noMillTurnCounter - Variable in Klasse persistance.Move
     
    noMillTurnCounter - Variable in Klasse persistance.MoveData
     
    NONE - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse boardLogic.GameManager.LossCause
     
    NONE - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse difficulties.DifficultyLevel
     
    notifyObservers() - Methode in Klasse view.Observable
    Notifies all registered observers by calling their Observer.update() method.
